# Vertex AI Dart Client

> Deprecated Dart client for the Vertex AI API — use googleai_dart for new projects.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/davidmigloz/ai_clients_dart/blob/main/packages/vertex_ai/README.md) (~3k tokens): Primary package documentation with installation, configuration, and usage examples.
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/davidmigloz/ai_clients_dart/blob/main/packages/vertex_ai/CHANGELOG.md) (~3.5k tokens): Release history and version-by-version changes.

## Examples

- [vertex_ai_example.dart](https://github.com/davidmigloz/ai_clients_dart/blob/main/packages/vertex_ai/example/vertex_ai_example.dart) (~207 tokens): Package overview example.

## Optional

- [Package directory](https://github.com/davidmigloz/ai_clients_dart/tree/main/packages/vertex_ai): Source tree, pubspec, and package-local files.

**Total: ~6.7k tokens**
